items.title: Dumb question: I’ve been running most of my cron jobs locally on my Mac Mini because it’s…
items.title_zh: 愚蠢的问题：我一直在 Mac Mini 上本地运行大部分 cron 作业，因为它......
items.description: Dumb question: I’ve been running most of my cron jobs locally on my Mac Mini because it’s already authenticated with Google Workspace and the other apps I use. But should I run these jobs in the cloud instead with these apps OAuth’d to my…
items.description_zh: 愚蠢的问题：我一直在 Mac Mini 上本地运行大部分 cron 作业，因为它已经通过 Google Workspace 和我使用的其他应用程序进行了身份验证。但是我应该在云中运行这些作业，而不是使用这些通过 OAuth 验证到我的应用程序吗？

items.title: true.
items.description: true. let’s unpack this..people think data and evals are low skill, grunt work that you can just buy and stuff into models. in practice, the model lifecycle looks something like model strategy -> evals -> pre/post training/rl aligned to ev…
items.description_zh: 真的。让我们来解开这个......人们认为数据和评估是低技能、繁重的工作，你可以购买并填充到模型中。在实践中，模型生命周期看起来像模型策略 -> 评估 -> 训练前/训练后/RL 与 ev 对齐...

meta.bio: Prev: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana.

items.title: having worked with Brendan and mercor, can confirm they are excellent.
items.title_zh: 与 Brendan 和 Mercor 合作后，可以确认他们非常出色。
items.description: having worked with Brendan and mercor, can confirm they are excellent. also having worked in ai models for enterprise, can confirm the opportunity around data and evals for enterprise is massssive. https://t.co/39clGIUHmM
items.description_zh: 与 Brendan 和 Mercor 合作后，可以确认他们非常出色。还曾在企业人工智能模型方面工作过，可以确认企业的数据和评估机会是巨大的。 https://t.co/39clGIUHmM

meta.bio: Prev: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana.

items.title: guys, stop fixing typos and audio transcription errors in your prompts to ai.
items.title_zh: 伙计们，停止修复人工智能提示中的拼写错误和音频转录错误。
items.description: guys, stop fixing typos and audio transcription errors in your prompts to ai. they cracked the IMO. they know what ‘teh’ is.
items.description_zh: 伙计们，停止修复人工智能提示中的拼写错误和音频转录错误。他们破解了IMO。他们知道“teh”是什么。

items.title: This is a good clip that shows a few layouts.
items.title_zh: 这是一个很好的剪辑，展示了一些布局。
items.description: This is a good clip that shows a few layouts. I'm pretty happy with this, maybe the slide layout could be a bit different and I'm curious how it will alternate between camera cuts. That's all for now, will get Claude to do a full render &a…
items.description_zh: 这是一个很好的剪辑，展示了一些布局。我对此非常满意，也许幻灯片布局可能有点不同，我很好奇它将如何在相机剪辑之间交替。现在就这些了，让克劳德做一个完整的渲染&a......

items.title: I really like how it takes some of the slides which are static (each one of these is its…
items.title_zh: 我真的很喜欢它如何拍摄一些静态的幻灯片（每一张都是它的......
items.description: I really like how it takes some of the slides which are static (each one of these is its own slide in the original deck) and turns them into animations. https://t.co/1ITW2UWWna
items.description_zh: 我真的很喜欢它如何将一些静态幻灯片（每一张都是原始幻灯片中自己的幻灯片）并将其转换为动画。 https://t.co/1ITW2UWWna

items.title: Claude decided to make Youtube short clips.
items.title_zh: 克劳德决定制作 YouTube 短片。
items.description: Claude decided to make Youtube short clips. Again the transcription is really chaotic (and the video quality is purposefully low for quick rendering). https://t.co/Rl5yvXLVcf
items.description_zh: 克劳德决定制作 YouTube 短片。同样，转录确实很混乱（并且为了快速渲染而故意降低视频质量）。 https://t.co/Rl5yvXLVcf

items.title: The filesystem is beautiful.
items.description: The filesystem is beautiful. Want your https://t.co/99eEa13mZ3 agent to have GitHub powers? Define 𝚝𝚘𝚘𝚕𝚜/𝚐𝚒𝚝𝚑𝚞𝚋.𝚝𝚜 and export 𝚌𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚎𝙶𝚒𝚝𝚑𝚞𝚋𝚃𝚘𝚘𝚕𝚜(). Eve exists to shape an open ecosystem of pluggable models, ski…
items.description_zh: 文件系统很漂亮。希望您的 https://t.co/99eEa13mZ3 代理拥有 GitHub 权力吗？定义 𝚝𝚘𝚘𝚕𝚜/𝚐𝚒𝚝𝚑𝚞𝚋.𝚝𝚜 并导出𝚌𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚎𝙶𝚒𝚝𝚑𝚞𝚋𝚃𝚘𝚘𝚕𝚜（）。 Eve 的存在是为了塑造一个由可插拔模型、滑雪……组成的开放生态系统。

items.title: Welcome @bekacru to Vercel.
items.description: Welcome @bekacru to Vercel. It's a privilege to join forces with Bereket and Better Auth to further our Open SDK vision. Developers deserve better auth, to serve humans and agents, built in the open and with taste. That's what Bereket has…
items.description_zh: 欢迎 @bekacru 来到 Vercel。很荣幸能够与 Bereket 和 Better Auth 携手推进我们的开放 SDK 愿景。开发人员应该获得更好的授权，以开放且有品味的方式为人类和代理服务。这就是贝雷凯特所拥有的……
